summary: The page has a perfect performance score, with all metrics meeting the recommended thresholds.

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: LCP measures the time it takes for the largest content element to be painted.

findings.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
findings.description: CLS measures the movement of visible elements within the viewport.

findings.title: First Contentful Paint
findings.description: FCP measures the time it takes for the first content element to be painted.

findings.title: Total Blocking Time
findings.description: TBT measures the total time spent on tasks that block the main thread.
findings.evidence: TBT: 0 ms (mobile and desktop); budget 200 ms

findings.title: Speed Index
findings.description: Speed Index measures how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.
findings.evidence: Speed Index: 1606.47 ms (mobile) / 740.23 ms (desktop); budget 3000 ms
